reviews.review_description: So cute, my kids love it!
A great 3d vr game. I got all the stars. easier to play with a gamepad.

developer_response.body: All stars?! I have to make more levels faster for you :) Meantime you can try it without gamepad ;)

reviews.review_description: Top notch graphics and a huge amount of diversity in gameplay. Very nice!

Excellent 3d vr adventure game the graphics are great and the details are really good. probably the best i seen on the gear vr which is quite impressive but the lightmap of some of the environments need fixing. not sure if its the app itself or my s6 edge plus but anywho is it possible to add the female frog as a playable character?

developer_response.body: Thanks! Female as playable is very easy and good idea. But there is problem with story. Male frog will run away and female is find him :) It is not very brave frog. Can you let me know where is the problem with lightmap? So I can fix it. You can contact me on the: cenda@cenda.cz
